nodes.name: AbstractServiceMessageSource.java
nodes.summary: Abstract base implementation of ServiceMessageSource providing locale management, message code resolution, hierarchical locale resolution, and delegating message retrieval for concrete subclasses.

nodes.name: CompositeServiceMessageSource.java
nodes.summary: Composite implementation of ReloadableResourceServiceMessageSource that delegates message resolution across a prioritized list of child ServiceMessageSource instances, returns the first non-null result.

nodes.name: ServiceMessageException.java
nodes.summary: Runtime exception that resolves localized messages via MessageUtils, supporting message pattern codes like {messageCode} for dynamic i18n error messages.

nodes.name: ServiceMessageSource.java
nodes.summary: Core service interface for internationalized message resolution defining the contract for getting messages by code and locale, with default methods for common locale and source handling.

nodes.name: I18nUtils.java
nodes.summary: Global static accessor and utility class for the ServiceMessageSource singleton, with recursive discovery of leaf sources within CompositeServiceMessageSource hierarchies.

nodes.name: MessageUtils.java
nodes.summary: Message pattern resolution utility that extracts i18n message codes from {code} patterns and resolves them through the global ServiceMessageSource, with fallback to the original pattern when no translation is found.

nodes.name: I18nEndpointAutoConfigurationBootstrap.java
nodes.summary: Spring Boot test bootstrap application that starts a servlet-based container with EnableAutoConfiguration and registers a test ServiceMessageSourceFactoryBean for endpoint integration testing.

nodes.name: DelegatingServiceMessageSource.java
nodes.summary: Spring-aware delegating CompositeServiceMessageSource that auto-discovers all ServiceMessageSource beans in the BeanFactory and delegates to them as the primary message source bean.

nodes.name: ServiceMessageSourceFactoryBean.java
nodes.summary: Spring FactoryBean that creates and manages ServiceMessageSource instances from SpringFactoriesLoader configuration, resolving default and supported locales from environment properties, and reloading on ResourceServiceMessageSourceChangedEvent.

nodes.name: I18nBeanUtils.java
nodes.summary: Spring bean utility class for retrieving i18n-related beans (MessageSource, MessageSourceAdapter, ServiceMessageSource) from a BeanFactory with proper type casting and null safety.

nodes.name: ServiceMessageSourceBeanLifecyclePostProcessorTest.java
nodes.summary: JUnit 5 test for ServiceMessageSourceBeanLifecyclePostProcessor verifying that init/destroy method names are correctly set on RootBeanDefinition for ServiceMessageSource and DelegatingServiceMessageSource bean types.

nodes.name: I18nBeanUtilsTest.java
nodes.summary: JUnit 5 test for I18nBeanUtils verifying message source bean retrieval in various Spring container configurations including exposed adapters and disabled i18n setups.

nodes.name: AbstractServiceMessageSource
nodes.summary: Abstract base class implementing ServiceMessageSource with locale management, hierarchical locale resolution, message code prefixing, and configurable default/supported locales for concrete subclasses.

nodes.name: getMessage
nodes.summary: Resolves and retrieves an internationalized message by code and locale, performing message code resolution, locale resolution (with fallback to language-only locale), and internal message lookup.

nodes.name: resolveHierarchicalLocales
nodes.summary: Expands a collection of supported locales into a hierarchical set including both region-specific and language-only locale variants for locale fallback resolution.

nodes.name: CompositeServiceMessageSource
nodes.summary: Composite implementation that aggregates multiple ServiceMessageSource instances and delegates message, locale, and resource operations across them, supporting reload and initialization lifecycle methods.

nodes.name: getMessage
nodes.summary: Iterates through composited ServiceMessageSource instances and returns the first non-null message for the given code and locale.

nodes.name: setServiceMessageSources
nodes.summary: Sets and sorts the composited ServiceMessageSource list by priority, replacing the previous sources list and cleaning up old references.

nodes.name: reload
nodes.summary: Reloads changed resources across all composited ReloadableResourceServiceMessageSource instances that can handle the given resource changes.

nodes.name: getSupportedLocales
nodes.summary: Aggregates all supported locales from composited sources into a unified set, falling back to parent interface defaults when empty.

nodes.name: ServiceMessageException
nodes.summary: Runtime exception that stores a message pattern and arguments, resolving localized messages through MessageUtils for i18n-aware error reporting.

nodes.name: toString
nodes.summary: Returns a detailed string representation including the class name, original message, arguments array, and the localized message resolved via MessageUtils.

nodes.name: ServiceMessageSource
nodes.summary: Core interface defining the service internationalization contract with methods for message resolution, locale handling, lifecycle management, and source identification.

nodes.name: I18nUtils
nodes.summary: Abstract utility class providing global static access to a ServiceMessageSource singleton, with recursive leaf-source discovery within composite hierarchies and lifecycle management.

nodes.name: serviceMessageSource
nodes.summary: Returns the global ServiceMessageSource singleton, falling back to EmptyServiceMessageSource with a warning if not initialized.

nodes.name: initServiceMessageSources
nodes.summary: Recursively traverses a ServiceMessageSource tree, extracting leaf (non-composite) sources from CompositeServiceMessageSource wrappers into a flat list.

nodes.name: MessageUtils
nodes.summary: Utility class that resolves message patterns in {code} format to localized messages via the global ServiceMessageSource, with locale-specific resolution and fallback to the original pattern.

nodes.name: getLocalizedMessage
nodes.summary: Resolves a message pattern to a localized string by extracting the message code from {code} braces, querying the ServiceMessageSource, and falling back to the pattern itself or a source-stripped code.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses {code} pattern syntax with dot-separated source prefixes for scoped message resolution.

nodes.name: I18nEndpointAutoConfigurationBootstrap
nodes.summary: Spring Boot test bootstrap class with EnableAutoConfiguration that starts a servlet container and registers a test ServiceMessageSourceFactoryBean for manual endpoint verification.

nodes.name: DelegatingServiceMessageSource
nodes.summary: Spring bean that extends CompositeServiceMessageSource, auto-discovers all ServiceMessageSource beans from the BeanFactory, and serves as the primary delegating message source for the application context.

nodes.name: ServiceMessageSourceFactoryBean
nodes.summary: Spring FactoryBean that instantiates ServiceMessageSource implementations from SpringFactoriesLoader, initializes them with environment-configured locales, and handles resource change events for hot reload.

nodes.name: initServiceMessageSources
nodes.summary: Loads AbstractServiceMessageSource implementations from Spring factories, instantiates them with the configured source name, applies locale settings, and sorts by priority.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses SpringFactoriesLoader for SPI-like service discovery with reflection-based constructor invocation.

nodes.name: resolveDefaultLocale
nodes.summary: Reads the default locale from Spring Environment configuration property, falling back to the system default locale when the property is not set.

nodes.name: resolveSupportedLocales
nodes.summary: Reads the supported locales list from Spring Environment configuration property, parsing locale strings and falling back to defaults when the property is not set.

nodes.name: I18nBeanUtils
nodes.summary: Utility class providing static methods to retrieve Spring i18n beans (MessageSource, MessageSourceAdapter, ServiceMessageSource) from a BeanFactory with null-safe access.

nodes.name: ServiceMessageSourceBeanLifecyclePostProcessorTest
nodes.summary: JUnit 5 test class that verifies the post-processor correctly injects init/destroy method names into RootBeanDefinition for various ServiceMessageSource bean types.

nodes.name: testPostProcessMergedBeanDefinition
nodes.summary: Parameterized test that verifies init/destroy method injection for ServiceMessageSource, DelegatingServiceMessageSource, and plain Object bean types across multiple override scenarios.

nodes.name: I18nBeanUtilsTest
nodes.summary: JUnit 5 test class that validates I18nBeanUtils message source retrieval behavior across different Spring configuration scenarios with and without EnableI18n.
